title: USDA Prim Specs Production Contract
format_neutral_rules: contracts/document-model-productions/prim-spec.contract.json#laws — field set, child-list invariants, listOp subfield rules, and value-shape rules are pinned in the format-neutral production. This contract adds USDA-specific grammar dispatch and storage mapping.

included: def, over, and class prim specifiers
quoted prim names and parent/name path construction
prim metadata fields including composition-arc fields as stored authored data
deferred: composition semantics for references, payloads, inherits, specializes, variants, and relocates
schema interpretation of kind, active, instanceable, or typeName

storage_mapping.PrimSpecifier: specifier field as a native specifier enum/domain value
storage_mapping.PrimName: path component and parent primChildren entry
storage_mapping.PropertySpec: child property spec and parent propertyChildren entry
storage_mapping.VariantSetStatement: variant set spec and parent variantSetChildren entry
storage_mapping.payload: payload field as authored listOp<Payload> containing native Payload arc records
storage_mapping.references: references field as authored listOp<Reference> containing native Reference arc records

requirements: a missing ListOp token authors the explicit subfield
prepend, append, and delete author only their named subfield
None authors an empty listOp value for the selected subfield
a missing ListOp token authors the explicit subfield
prepend, append, and delete author only their named subfield
None authors an empty listOp value for the selected subfield

references.storage: references as listOp<Reference> with native Reference items containing optional asset reference, optional target prim path handle, offset, and scale
requirements: a missing ListOp token authors the explicit subfield
ReferenceList may be None, a single item, or a bracketed list of items
offset defaults to 0.0 and scale defaults to 1.0 when omitted
repeated offset or scale parameters use last-one-wins
customData must be parsed if present, but document-model storage may discard it because it is vestigial
reference target must contain at least one of asset or path
domain storage must not represent a Reference item as a JSON object, dictionary, bare asset string, or bare path string; those spellings are parser input or dump output only

payload.storage: payload as listOp<Payload> with native Payload items containing optional asset reference, optional target prim path handle, offset, and scale
requirements: a missing ListOp token authors the explicit subfield
PayloadList may be None, an empty bracketed list, a single item, or a bracketed list of items
offset defaults to 0.0 and scale defaults to 1.0 when omitted
repeated offset or scale parameters use last-one-wins
payload target must contain at least one of asset or path
domain storage must not represent a Payload item as a JSON object, dictionary, bare asset string, or bare path string; those spellings are parser input or dump output only
a missing ListOp token authors the explicit subfield
variantSetNames storage is independent from variantSetChildren storage
a missing ListOp token authors the explicit subfield
prepend, append, and delete author only their named subfield
schema fallback properties and applied-schema semantics are not interpreted by the parser
dictionary keys are variant set names
dictionary values are selected variant names or empty strings
variantSelection is authored layer data and must not select or populate variants during parsing
kind is stored as authored metadata and is not schema-interpreted by this parser

laws: spec paths must be built through usd-paths parent/name construction

payload, references, inherits, specializes, variants, variantSets, apiSchemas, and kind are prim metadata keyword or schema metadata productions and must not be parsed through generic untyped KeyValueMetadata
format_neutral_laws_hoisted: prim specifier is a native EnumSpecifier value, not a durable string or JSON payload (document-model-productions/prim-spec.contract.json#laws)
primChildren, propertyChildren, and variantSetChildren are maintained by usd-document-model in agreement with stored child specs (document-model-productions/prim-spec.contract.json#laws)
authored composition arc fields are stored without evaluating composition (document-model-productions/prim-spec.contract.json#laws)
a single item authored where a listOp is allowed becomes an explicit listOp (document-model-productions/common-metadata.contract.json#listop_subfields)
repeated listOp metadata subfields use last-one-wins per subfield within a single layer (document-model-productions/common-metadata.contract.json#repeated_field_semantics)
golden_groups: all prim specifiers with and without typeName
references, payloads, inherits, specializes, variantSets, apiSchemas, variants, and kind as stored fields
duplicate metadata and duplicate spec diagnostics
